## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script as Script
    participant EntityDB as ENTITY_DB_CONN
    participant ShipDB as SHIPMENTS_DB_CONN
    Script->>EntityDB: execute subscription SELECT (shipments)
    EntityDB-->>Script: shipments rows
    Script->>ShipDB: execute active_shipment SELECT for creator_shipment_id, org
    ShipDB-->>Script: active_shipments row (creator_shipment_id, customer_fv_id, carrier_fv_id, full_count)
    alt full_count == 1
        Script->>ShipDB: query public.user by email (ilike)
        ShipDB-->>Script: user row (auth0_id, full_count)
        alt user full_count == 1
            Script->>EntityDB: UPDATE subscription set unsubscribe_callback_data
            EntityDB-->>Script: update result
        else user not unique/absent
            Script-->>Script: skip update
        end
    else full_count > 1
        Script-->>Script: increment shipment_more_than_once_count
    end
    Script-->>Script: print active_shipments_count and shipment_more_than_once_count
```
